# Sifter

> Sifter is a location-based group chat app for iPhone. Users create and join chat rooms tied to real-world geographic locations — a coffee shop, a concert venue, a college campus, a city block. Only people physically within a room's geofence can see or join it, so every conversation is grounded in a shared physical place.

## What makes Sifter different

- **Geofenced chat rooms**: Every chat room is anchored to a precise latitude, longitude, and radius. Users can only see and join rooms they are physically inside. When they walk out of the boundary, they leave the conversation automatically.
- **Hyperlocal by design**: Rooms are created by registered users at specific locations, not by the app. There is no random pairing, no global feed, and no nearby "who's online" list — only intentional, location-anchored conversations.
- **Phone-verified accounts**: Users register with a phone number and SMS OTP. Usernames are visible in every room. Guest accounts can only join rooms where the creator explicitly enabled guest access.
- **Ephemeral by default**: Conversations disappear when the user leaves the geofence, after a period of inactivity, or when the room creator closes the room manually.
- **Built-in safety**: Automated profanity and NSFW filtering, user reporting, user blocking, room-level moderation (mute, ban, remove messages), age verification, and a 24-hour response commitment to all reports.

## Core pages

- [Sifter homepage](https://sifter.cc/): Landing page with features, how-it-works, and use cases
- [Download Sifter](https://sifter.cc/download/): Short redirect URL to the App Store listing
- [Privacy Policy](https://sifter.cc/privacy/): Data collection, storage, and user rights
- [Terms of Service](https://sifter.cc/terms/): Acceptable use and service terms
- [Report a Bug](https://sifter.cc/report/): Public bug reporting portal

## App Store

- [Sifter on the Apple App Store](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/sifter/id6590625208): Free download, iOS 15.6 or later

## Common use cases

- **Events and concerts**: Coordinate meetups in the crowd, ask where the good seats are, share reactions to a live performance with other attendees.
- **College campuses**: Study groups in the library, dorm chats, quad announcements, campus-wide events.
- **Neighborhoods**: Lost pet alerts, block party organizing, local news discussion, asking neighbors for advice.
- **Coffee shops and third places**: Meet the people sitting next to you without exchanging personal information upfront.
- **Travel and airports**: Chat with fellow travelers at a terminal, gate, or hotel during layovers or delays.

## Technical facts

- Platform: iOS 15.6 and later
- Price: Free
- Location data usage: Foreground and background location, used exclusively for enforcing chat room geofence boundaries
- No location data is shared with other users
- Rooms are group chats, not one-to-one pairings
- Sifter is not a dating app, not a random chat app, and not a roulette-style chat service

## Company

Sifter is operated by 702 AI Services, based in Las Vegas, Nevada.

- Contact: info@sifter.cc
- Privacy questions: privacy@sifter.cc
- Legal questions: legal@sifter.cc
